publishedAbstract: Mount of PVC is failing with "volume volume_name has volumeMode Filesystem, but is specified in volumeDevices" For some reason it tries to mount PVC with option volumeDevices:- devicePath: /dbconfig name: dbvol" MTC mounts PVC " storageClassName: ocs-storagecluster-ceph-rbd volumeMode: Filesystem" with options " volumeDevices:- devicePath: /dbconfig name: dbvol"
publishedTitle: MTC unable to mount PVC for stage migration
